raw_consumer_statement:
-- XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX Eastern time, a charge of {$42.00} at a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, New York. According to Barclay 's, my digital wallet was used. 
I have called Barclay 's JetBlue Elite credit card fraud department multiple times and had three investigations opened, because each time I call, the agent is unable to answer simple questions about this disputed transaction. 
Specifically : -- 1 ) There is no XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, New York. So where did I allegedly physically make the transaction? What is the address? 
-- 2 ) I used my credit card to make an in-person transaction in XXXX, NJ, on XXXX XXXX, XXXX. That actual, in-person transaction ( which I don't dispute ) was 23 minutes after the alleged transaction At XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX NY -- a physical impossibility if the same device was used. Was the same device used in both transactions, and how is that verified? How can you be sure the device ID wasn't cloned? 
-- 3 ) When Barclay 's reached out to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, what information was obtained about the XXXX XXXX transaction? What membership name/ID was tied to the allegedly transaction?
